description: Food Safety and Standards Authority of India — Standards for Bakery Products (Cookies & Biscuits)

rules.name: Trans Fat Limit
rules.description: Trans fat (TFA) must not exceed 2% of total fat content. FSSAI FSS Act 2006, Schedule 2.2.6.

rules.name: Aflatoxin B1 Limit
rules.description: Aflatoxin B1 is a potent carcinogen. Maximum 1 ppm (mg/kg) in cereals and cereal-based products.

rules.name: Melamine Ban
rules.description: Melamine is a nitrogen-rich compound banned from all food products under FSSAI regulations.

rules.name: Moisture Content
rules.description: Moisture must not exceed 6% for shelf stability and microbial safety.

rules.name: Acid Insoluble Ash
rules.description: Acid insoluble ash must not exceed 0.1% — indicates processing quality.

rules.name: Lead Limit
rules.description: Lead (Pb) in bakery products must not exceed 2.5 ppm as per FSSAI Heavy Metals Schedule.

rules.name: Arsenic Limit
rules.description: Arsenic (As) must not exceed 0.5 ppm in bakery/cereal products — FSSAI Heavy Metals Schedule.

rules.name: Mercury Ban
rules.description: Mercury (Hg) is strictly banned in food products. Zero tolerance.

rules.name: Heavy Metals Cumulative Limit
rules.description: Cumulative sum of Lead + Arsenic must not exceed 3.0 ppm in finished bakery products.

rules.name: Sulphur Dioxide / Preservatives
rules.description: Sulphur Dioxide used as preservative must not exceed 100 ppm in biscuits/cookies (FSSAI).
